description: Transform the maintenance request log into a functional tracking system featuring time-based formulas, conditional formatting for overdue items, and summary statistics for management reporting. Save the updated workbook to /home/ga/Documents/maintenance_tracker.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You have a spreadsheet with maintenance requests for an apartment building. Add formulas to calculate how many days each request has been open, highlight overdue items (more than 7 days) using conditional formatting, and create a summary section showing total requests, open items, overdue count, and total costs.
